summary: Clean, focused implementation that adds bulk fetch optimization, milestone capping, and --full flag to the GitHub reconciler. 8/8 tests pass. Code is well-structured with proper fallbacks.

findings.title: Proper fallback to getIssue when bulk map misses
findings.description: reconcileIssue correctly checks bulk map first, falls back to individual API call if not found (AC-US1-03).

findings.title: bulkFetchIssueStates handles parse failures gracefully
findings.description: Empty map returned on JSON parse failure, causing graceful degradation to per-issue calls.

findings.title: 8 test cases cover all ACs comprehensively
findings.description: TC-001 through TC-008 cover bulk fetch, map lookup, fallback, default/full limits, milestone capping, and propagation.

findings.title: No error-path test for bulkFetchIssueStates failure
findings.description: The implementation handles parse errors gracefully (returns empty map), but there is no explicit test for the gh CLI returning non-zero exit code. Low risk since the fallback path is covered by TC-003.

findings.title: Uses execFileNoThrow (no shell injection)
findings.description: All gh CLI calls use execFileNoThrow with argument arrays, not string concatenation.

findings.title: API calls reduced from ~70 to ~3 per typical run
findings.description: Bulk search replaces per-issue getIssue calls. Milestone cap at 20 avoids pagination. This is the core value of the increment.

findings.title: Magic numbers for limits
findings.description: 100 and 1000 are inline constants in reconcile(). Could be extracted to named constants for clarity, but acceptable given they are only used in two places.

findings.title: Empty bulk map handled correctly
findings.description: When no issues match the search, all issues fall back to individual getIssue calls.

findings.title: Milestone NDJSON parsing is defensive
findings.description: reconcileMilestones parses line-by-line with try/catch per line, skipping unparseable output.

acCoverage.AC-US1-01: COVERED - bulkFetchIssueStates method added, returns Map<number, 'open'|'closed'>
acCoverage.AC-US1-02: COVERED - reconcileIssue reads from pre-fetched map first
acCoverage.AC-US1-03: COVERED - falls back to getIssue when not in map
acCoverage.AC-US1-04: COVERED - default limit=100, configurable via full flag
acCoverage.AC-US3-01: COVERED - full option on ReconcileOptions interface
acCoverage.AC-US3-02: COVERED - constructor reads full from options
